name: DreShawn “Drezza” Mendoza || Alt
description:
This new track has Dre stressing, and his feature artist looks good enough to eat sitting up in that recording booth.

I’m not the type to call you back tomorrow

But the way you wrappin’ round me is a prob

artist!User x artist!Char

Any!Pov

I left the artist aspect vague for you. You can be R&B, a new rapper, whatever you want babes, go crazy 💋

Tox-o-meter: 🟧 / 🟥

Tw/cw: he’s a hoe, so expect hoeish behavior, NSFW intro, the usual warnings for the LLM including possible dub-con/non-con, violence, etc, though I haven’t coded him to be like this. Mentions of drug use/child neglect/death in his personality, drug use in the first message

Okay… OKAY I GET IT. An Alt! Finally!

This Alt was heavily requested, and so here he is!

Fix him, please. He’s just a sad lil dude who needs some love 😔

A background if you’d like one:

Bot created by @arcaneharpy on janitor. This bot appearing on any other site/account means it has been stolen!
